title: DM Leak Prevention - Structural Fix
summary: message(action=send) was routing to Xiaosong DM instead of #agent-team. Root cause: missing target/replyTo params. Implemented 3-layer defense: (1) standing rule to always use slack-send.ps1, (2) script hardcodes channel, (3) post-send self-check.
lesson: Don't rely on memory/rules alone for critical routing. Use code enforcement (hardcoded channel in script) to make misrouting impossible.
